title: Hiring Store Manager at Starbucks India

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Starbucks India
jsonLd.description:
Starbucks India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Starbucks India:
Starbucks India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Starbucks India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
